description: Style Note Super soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game! Product Details Black sling bag that has a flap and magnetic buttoned closure, one main compartment, an inner zipped pocket, buckle design on the front, zipped pocket at the back, one leather adjustable handle, stitch detailing and branded zips Material and Care Vintage leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Dimensions: 18 cm x 19.5 cm
